headline: Asian stocks fluctuate as traders eye crucial US jobs data
summary: Asian stocks were mixed Wednesday as investors nervously awaited key US jobs data that could help determine the Federal Reserve's next interest rate decision, while the yen is in focus as it wallows around four-decade lows.But fears are growing that those valuations have now gone too far, investors might not see returns as early as expected and US interest rates could start to go up.

content.title: Asian stocks fluctuate as traders eye crucial US jobs data
content.summary: Asian stocks were mixed Wednesday as investors nervously awaited key US jobs data that could help determine the Federal Reserve's next interest rate decision, while the yen is in focus as it wallows around four-decade lows.But fears are growing that those valuations have now gone too far, investors might not see returns as early as expected and US interest rates could start to go up.

thumbnail.caption: Investors are awaiting the release of key US jobs data this week (SCOTT OLSON)
